# scout-skeleton

<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Render this component while you are waiting for your content.
Could be a fetch, or another way of loading data.
Either toggle the render of the component, or use the disable property unmount the skeleton.

## Properties

| Property          | Attribute          | Description                                                        | Type      | Default |
| ----------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------- | ------- |
| `backgroundColor` | `background-color` | If you are in need of a specific background color, you can set it. | `string`  | `null`  |
| `disable`         | `disable`          | Disable skeleton, unmounting the skeleton.                         | `boolean` | `false` |
